file_info.title: SMS Intrastate Non-Hazmat - Pass/Property
file_info.description: Calculated from monthly snapshots of input data files. Contains FMCSA summary results of all active Intrastate Non-Hazmat motor carriers of property and/or passengers.
file_info.format: Comma delimited, one carrier per row

fields.name: DOT_NUMBER
fields.description: US DOT Number of the Motor Carrier (Intrastate Non-Hazmat only)

fields.name: INSP_TOTAL
fields.description: Total number of inspections for the measurement period (24 months)

fields.name: DRIVER_INSP_TOTAL
fields.description: Total number of driver inspections for the measurement period

fields.name: DRIVER_OOS_INSP_TOTAL
fields.description: Total number of driver inspections containing at least one Driver Out-of-Service violation

fields.name: VEHICLE_INSP_TOTAL
fields.description: Total number of vehicle inspections for the measurement period

fields.name: VEHICLE_OOS_INSP_TOTAL
fields.description: Total number of vehicle inspections containing at least one Vehicle Out-of-Service violation

fields.name: UNSAFE_DRIV_INSP_W_VIOL
fields.description: Number of inspections with at least one Unsafe Driving BASIC violation

fields.name: UNSAFE_DRIV_MEASURE
fields.description: Unsafe Driving BASIC Roadside Performance Measure Value

fields.name: UNSAFE_DRIV_AC
fields.description: Unsafe Driving BASIC Acute/Critical Indicator

values.Y: Acute/Critical from investigation within previous 12 months

fields.name: HOS_DRIV_INSP_W_VIOL
fields.description: Number of inspections with at least one Hours-of-Service BASIC violation

fields.name: HOS_DRIV_MEASURE
fields.description: Hours-of-Service (HOS) Compliance BASIC Roadside Performance measure value

fields.name: HOS_DRIV_AC
fields.description: Hours-of-Service (HOS) Compliance BASIC Acute/Critical Indicator

values.Y: Acute/Critical from investigation within previous 12 months

fields.name: DRIV_FIT_INSP_W_VIOL
fields.description: Number of inspections with at least one Driver Fitness BASIC violation

fields.name: DRIV_FIT_MEASURE
fields.description: Driver Fitness BASIC Roadside Performance measure value

fields.name: DRIV_FIT_AC
fields.description: Driver Fitness BASIC Serious Violation Indicator

values.Y: Acute/Critical from investigation within previous 12 months

fields.name: CONTR_SUBST_INSP_W_VIOL
fields.description: Number of inspections with at least one Controlled Substances and Alcohol BASIC violation

fields.name: CONTR_SUBST_MEASURE
fields.description: Controlled Substances and Alcohol BASIC Roadside Performance measure value

fields.name: CONTR_SUBST_AC
fields.description: Controlled Substances and Alcohol BASIC Acute/Critical Indicator

values.Y: Acute/Critical from investigation within previous 12 months

fields.name: VEH_MAINT_INSP_W_VIOL
fields.description: Number of inspections with at least one Vehicle Maintenance BASIC violation

fields.name: VEH_MAINT_MEASURE
fields.description: Vehicle Maintenance BASIC Roadside Performance measure value

fields.name: VEH_MAINT_AC
fields.description: Vehicle Maintenance BASIC Acute/Critical Indicator

values.Y: Acute/Critical from investigation within previous 12 months
